diagrams.name: messaging_frontend_interactions
diagrams.title: Messaging Frontend Interactions
diagrams.description: User sends and receives messages across all chat platform frontends (Telegram, QQ, DingTalk, WeCom, WeChat, Feishu) via a shared common interface

diagrams.name: desktop_and_web_ui_interactions
diagrams.title: Desktop & Web UI Interactions
diagrams.description: User interacts with the agent via Qt desktop app, desktop pet companion, or Streamlit web UI; includes chat rendering and session controls

diagrams.name: agent_core_loop
diagrams.title: Agent Core Loop & Turn Management
diagrams.description: User triggers agent execution; agent loop dispatches tool calls, handles step outcomes, and manages multi-turn conversation flow

diagrams.name: llm_backend_integration
diagrams.title: LLM Backend Integration
diagrams.description: Agent sends prompts to multiple LLM backends (Anthropic, OAI-compatible, MiniMax); manages streaming, token counting, history compression, and thinking modes

diagrams.name: memory_and_credential_management
diagrams.title: Memory & Credential Management
diagrams.description: Agent stores and retrieves API keys/secrets via keychain; compresses and archives raw sessions; searches for relevant skills

diagrams.name: screen_capture_and_ocr
diagrams.title: Screen Capture & OCR
diagrams.description: Agent captures screen content, performs OCR to extract text, and detects UI elements for vision-based task execution

diagrams.name: android_device_control
diagrams.title: Android Device Control (ADB)
diagrams.description: Agent controls Android devices via ADB: dumps UI hierarchy, taps, swipes, inputs text, and reads device state

diagrams.name: web_browsing_and_js_execution
diagrams.title: Web Browsing & JavaScript Execution
diagrams.description: Agent launches browser sessions, navigates pages, executes JavaScript, and receives DOM results via WebSocket-based driver

diagrams.name: code_and_tool_execution
diagrams.title: Code Execution & General Agent Actions
diagrams.description: Agent runs Python/shell code, reads and writes files, searches content, calls web APIs, and manages browser context via the general actions module
diagrams.scope: Code execution and tool action layer

diagrams.name: autonomous_scheduling_and_reflection
diagrams.title: Autonomous Scheduling & Reflection
diagrams.description: Scheduler triggers periodic agent tasks autonomously; autonomous operation helper executes SOP-driven reflection loops without direct user input

diagrams.name: process_memory_inspection
diagrams.title: Process Memory Inspection
diagrams.description: Agent scans process memory regions to extract runtime data (e.g., credentials, state) from other running processes on Windows
